name: testRowsPerPageSelectionDisplaysCorrectNumberOfRows
description: Verify that selecting a 'Rows Per Page' option displays the correct number of rows in the table.
descriptionHtml: Verify that selecting a 'Rows Per Page' option displays the correct number of rows in the table.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0627.124934.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Verify that selecting a 'Rows Per Page' option displays the correct number of rows in the table.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click 'Acquirers' tab
Select Rows Per Page '10'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Click next page button
Click pagination page button '1'
Verify: The table contains rows less than or equal to '10' per page
Select Rows Per Page '25'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The table contains rows less than or equal to '25' per page
Select Rows Per Page '50'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The table contains rows less than or equal to '50' per page
Select Rows Per Page '100'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Verify: The table contains rows less than or equal to '100' per page
